name: Levi Ackerman

summary: Levi Ackerman, is the squad captain of the Special Operations Squad within the Survey Corps, and is widely known as humanity's strongest soldier.

name: Satoru Gojo
summary: Satoru Gojo is one of the main protagonists of the Jujutsu Kaisen series. He is a Special Grade Jujutsu Sorcerer who is widely recognized as the strongest of the Modern Era.

name: Monkey D. Luffy (Post-Timeskip)

abilities: Gear 3rd (inflated body parts for stronger attacks)
Gear 4th (enhanced strength and speed with a cost)

summary: Monkey D. Luffy, also known as Straw Hat Luffy, is the main protagonist of the One Piece series. He seeks to find One Piece and become the Pirate King.

name: Monkey D. Luffy (Netflix)
summary: Monkey D. Luffy, known as 'Straw Hat Luffy', is the main protagonist of the manga, anime, and now live action television series, One Piece.

name: Monkey D. Luffy (Pre-Timeskip)

abilities: Gear 3rd (inflating body parts for stronger attacks)

summary: Monkey D. Luffy, also known as Straw Hat Luffy, is the main protagonist of the One Piece series. He seeks to find One Piece and become the Pirate King, using his stretching powers and creative techniques to fight against powerful enemies.

name: Monkey D. Luffy (Emperor)
summary: Monkey D. Luffy is the main protagonist of the manga and anime One Piece. He's the son of Monkey D. Dragon, a revolutionary considered 'The World's Most Dangerous Criminal'; the grandson of Monkey D. Garp, a powerful Marine Vice-Admiral; the sworn brother of late 'Fire Fist' Portgas D. Ace and Revolutionary chief of staff Sabo; and the foster son of Curly Dadan. He seeks to find One Piece and become the Pirate King.

name: Monkey D. Garp
summary: Monkey D. Garp is a Marine vice admiral, the father of Monkey D. Dragon, the grandfather of Monkey D. Luffy, and the adoptive grandfather of Portgas D. Ace.

name: Eren Yeager

stats.tier: 9-A (higher with Swords), 8-B possibly 8-A with Swords boosted by ODM gear

summary: Main protagonist of Attack on Titan. He lived a peaceful life in Shiganshina District with his now late parents Grisha and Carla Yeager, and his childhood friend Mikasa Ackerman, until the town was destroyed by Titans during the fall of Wall Maria.

name: Roronoa Zoro (Pre-Timeskip)

stats.tier: 8-A | 7-C | Low 7-B | 6-C (higher with Strongest Attacks, even higher with Asura)

summary: Roronoa Zoro, also known by his epithet “Pirate Hunter”, is the premier swordsman of the Straw Hat Pirates and a member of the Monster Trio.

name: Roronoa Zoro (Netflix)
summary: Roronoa Zoro, also known by his epithet “Pirate Hunter”, is the premier swordsman of the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Roronoa Zoro (Post-Timeskip)
summary: Roronoa Zoro, also known by his former epithet of 'Pirate Hunter' after the Raid, is the premier swordsman of the Straw Hat Pirates and a member of the Monster Trio. He uses a unique Three-Sword Style in battle.

name: Gishki Emilia
summary: The daughter of Gishki Noellia, Gishki Emilia is one of the survivors of the first Great War. She was sacrificed by her mother for a experimental ritual, but was eventually revived by the power of the Aquamirror Cycle and aided Constellar Rasalhague in controlling the Ice Barrier Dragons.

name: Lelouch vi Britannia

stats.tier: {{10-B}}, {{9-C}} with pistol | {{8-C}}, possibly {{High 8-C}} | {{8-A}}, '''higher''' with Hadron Cannons | At least {{8-A}}, likely '''higher''' with Hadr

summary: Lelouch Lamperouge is a student at Ashford Academy in Tokyo Settlement, and the Vice President of the student council. He lives with and cares for his younger sister, Nunnally. Truthfully, he is Lelouch vi Britannia, the eleventh prince of the Holy Britannian Empire, who went missing in Japan with his younger sister and was presumed dead.

name: L (Death Note)
summary: Eccentric and reclusive genius detective who is the lead investigator on the 'Kira' case, a serial killing spree caused by the mysterious use of a supernatural notebook called the Death Note.

name: Mikasa Ackerman

stats.tier: At least 9-A physically, at least 8-C with swords, 8-B possibly 8-A with Swords boosted by ODM gear higher with Thunder Spears
abilities: Resistance to Biological Manipulation (Ackermans cannot become mindless titans even if they ingest the Source of all living matter's gas and get willed to become one by the Coordinate)

summary: Mikasa Ackerman is the adoptive sister of Eren Yeager. After her biological parents were murdered by human traffickers, she was rescued by Eren and lived with him and his parents, Grisha and Carla, before the fall of Wall Maria. Though she desires only to live a peaceful life with Eren, Mikasa chose to follow him into the military—where she is considered the best soldier among the 104th Training Corps. She later enlists in the Survey Corps to follow and protect Eren.

name: Ken Kaneki

abilities: Enhanced physical abilities in Kakuja form

summary: Tokyo Ghoul is the main protagonist of the Tokyo Ghoul series. He is a half-human, half-ghoul who struggles to find his place in a world where ghouls are feared and persecuted.

name: Reigen Arataka

abilities: Power Nullification (Regeneration Negation) of Spirits through exorcism
Psychic Energy Manipulation (allows him to grant it to other people and project it)

summary: Arataka Reigen is Mob's mentor and boss. He is the self-proclaimed 'Greatest Psychic of the 21st Century' as well as owner and operator of the Spirits and Such Consultation Office.

name: Guts
summary: Guts, also known as 'The Black Swordsman', 'The One Hundred-Man Slayer' and 'The Struggler', was the former raid unit leader of a mercenary group known as the Band of the Hawk and is the main protagonist of Berserk.

name: Itachi Uchiha
summary: Itachi Uchiha is a highly skilled and powerful shinobi from the Hidden Leaf Village. He is known for his exceptional intelligence, strategic thinking, and mastery of the Sharingan eye.

name: Makima
summary: Makima is the enigmatic leader of Public Safety Devil Extermination Special Division 4 as well as the Chief Cabinet Secretary's Personal Devil Hunter. Her true identity is later revealed to be that of the Control Devil, the fear of control and domination embodied who seeks to utilize the Chainsaw Devil's power to create a new world eradicated of anything she considers a problem and where she could stand equal with others.

name: Future Mai (Anime)

stats.tier: 9-C to 9-B with firearms, far higher via Bulma's Parting Gift
stats.speed: Peak Human (is the swiftest human soldier in her group), Superhuman on her motor scooter
stats.durability: At least Wall level (survived her own rocket launchers exploding in her face point blank with little pain)
abilities: Peak Human Physical Characteristics (Strength, Speed, Stamina and Accuracy)
Martial Arts (Skilled in Hand to Hand combat)
Weapon Mastery (Master of Firearms and Explosives)

summary: Future Mai is an alternate universe version of the Dragon Ball character Mai who resides within Future Trunks' timeline. She forms a resistance group to combat Goku Black and shares a close connection with her fellow comrade Trunks.

name: Kakashi Hatake
summary: Kakashi Hatake is the Jonin leader of Team 7 in the series Naruto.

name: Yuji Itadori
summary: Yuji Itadori is a main protagonist of the series, known for his strong sense of justice and determination. He is a student at Jujutsu Kaisen High School and becomes involved in the world of cursed energy manipulation.

name: Frieren
summary: Frieren is the primary protagonist of Frieren: Beyond Journey's End. Eighty years after defeating the demon king as a member of the hero Himmel's party, she travels the world to discover new magic while visiting places where her party traveled during their 10 year voyage to defeat the demon king, in an attempt to relive those past memories, learn more about her past comrades, and discover why such a small time period of her life could have left such a profound impact on her.

name: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
summary: The Demon King has been defeated, and the victorious Hero Party returns home before disbanding. The four—mage Frieren, hero Himmel, priest Heiter, and warrior Eisen—reminisce about their decade-long journey as the moment to bid each other farewell arrives. But the passing of time is different for elves, thus Frieren witnesses her companions slowly pass away one by one.

name: Rintarou Okabe
summary: Self-proclaimed mad scientist and the main protagonist of Steins;Gate.
